extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated January 8, 2026
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Add – Trimont Station 13 Engine Changeout outage on January 13th
- Date change – Arnegard Station 4 Bison XP Project Station Outage moved from original dates of 1/21 through 2/6 to new dates of 3/2 through 3/13
- Add – Glen Ullin Station 6 Soakwash and Inspection on 1/15
- Add – Wetonka Station 9 Soakwash and Inspection on 1/22
- Add – Garvin Station 12 Soakwash and Inspection on 1/27
- Add – Saint Anthony Station 7 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/18
- Add – Zeeland Station 8 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/24
- Date change – Manning Station 5 Bison XP Project Station Outage moved out of March and into April with dates TBD
- Date change – Glen Ullin Station 6 Bison XP Project Station Outage changed from original 3/17 through 3/20 to new dates of 3/18 through 3/25
- Add spring outages in March

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance:
- 2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 010826
